Title: recordStakeTime post-snapshot drain
Fix Summary: Added require(!epochSnapshotted[epochId]) guard; recordStakeTime() subsequently removed in full StakingVault refactor

Title: O(V×C) gas ceiling in finalizeEpoch
Fix Summary: finalizeEpoch paginated; lazy autoFinalizeEpochs() added (capped at AUTO_FINALIZE_MAX_EPOCHS=10) triggered by partner activity

Title: Flash loan cumS inflation via balanceOf scanning
Fix Summary: cumS now grows exclusively through buy() and distributeToCustomer(). All balanceOf scanning removed. recoverToken() added to PartnerVault with PSRE rescue capped to surplus above ecosystemBalance

Title: createVault sandwich attack (USDC→PSRE swap)
Fix Summary: Fee tiers whitelisted to Uniswap standard tiers [100/500/3000/10000]. minPsreOut enforced as configurable % floor of usdcAmountIn. No TWAP oracle added — see Notes
Notes: TWAP oracle evaluated and deferred: fee whitelist + output floor blocks the attack vector consistent with standard Uniswap periphery practice. Happy to discuss if team disagrees.

Title: Cross-epoch accStakeTime contamination
Fix Summary: Full StakingVault refactor. Synthetix-style epoch-aware checkpointing. accStakeTime removed. Per-epoch epochTotalPSREStaked/epochTotalLPStaked snapshots taken at finalization

Title: Fee tier bypass in createVault
Fix Summary: Same fix as #4 — fee tier whitelist enforced

Title: E_scarcity scaling drift
Fix Summary: Corrected E_scarcity scaling in RewardEngine; epoch-level computation uses two-pass approach (see also #19)

Title: Stale partnerOf mapping
Fix Summary: Removed cached partnerOf dependency. All partner lookups now call vault.owner() directly

Title: StakingVault reward attribution error
Fix Summary: Resolved by StakingVault refactor (see #5)

Title: reclaimUnclaimed dead path
Fix Summary: Replaced with reclaimFromCV() on PartnerVault — correctly reclaims unclaimed customer balances

Title: CustomerVault deregistration not reflected in RewardEngine
Fix Summary: deregisterCustomerVault() now removes CV from RewardEngine state

Title: Vault decommission state inconsistency
Fix Summary: decommissionVault() updates all factory state. setMaxPartners() now requires _max >= activeVaultCount

Title: LP 1:1 staking weight vs PSRE (spec decision)
Fix Summary: Resolved by separating LP and PSRE into two independent sub-pools within the 30% staker allocation. Default 50/50 split governance-adjustable via setSplit(). No cross-asset comparison.

Title: transferOut callable from CustomerVault context
Fix Summary: transferOut() now reverts if msg.sender is a registered CustomerVault

Title: Unclaimed reward loss on stake change
Fix Summary: Resolved by StakingVault refactor. _checkpoint() called before every stake/unstake; v3 settles all finalized epochs into pendingRewards before balance changes

Title: Ghost emission while PSRE paused
Fix Summary: Added require(!psre.paused()) check at start of finalization

Title: EMA window includes current epoch (sumR)
Fix Summary: Two-pass approach implemented: sumR computed over last N completed epochs before the loop, then emission curve applied using pre-computed value
Notes: If team has remaining concerns beyond window bias, please share specifically and we will address.

Title: Claims not gated by whenNotPaused
Fix Summary: whenNotPaused added to all claim functions

Title: Two-pass EMA (sumR computed in-loop)
Fix Summary: Same fix as #17 — two-pass EMA implemented

Title: accStakeTime reset to 0 instead of decrement
Fix Summary: Changed to accStakeTime -= stakeTime; subsequently removed entirely in StakingVault v3 refactor

Title: qualified flag stale after epoch transition
Fix Summary: qualified check now delegates to RewardEngine at claim time — no cached flag

Title: Governance queue guard missing
Fix Summary: Minimum timelock enforcement added on governance queue operations

Title: PSRE epoch mint-cap DoS on batch finalization
Fix Summary: Added mintForEpoch(address to, uint256 amount, uint256 historicalEpochId) to PSRE.sol. RewardEngine calls mintForEpoch() charging each epoch's mint against its own cap — prevents "PSRE: epoch mint cap exceeded" revert during batch finalization

Title: StakingVault ClaimStake Paradox — passive stakers receive 0
Fix Summary: Full StakingVault v3 rewrite. _settleFinishedEpochs(user) called before every stake/unstake/claim. pendingRewards[user] accumulates across finalized epochs. claimAll() and claimStake(epochId) pay from pendingRewards. MAX_SETTLE_EPOCHS=52. New staker cursor initializes to currentEpochId()

Title: Zero-staker epoch pool permanently locked in StakingVault
Fix Summary: (1) distributeStakerRewards() returns early without pulling tokens when both staker pools are empty — pool stays in RewardEngine. (2) sweepUnclaimedPool(epochId, to) (onlyOwner) added for governance recovery of sub-pool where rewardPerToken==0
